MAGIC_CORRUPTION_POWER.title: Magic Corruption
MAGIC_CORRUPTION_POWER.description: Your enchanted cards cost [blue]0[/blue]{Energy:energyIcons()} and [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Stars[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] when played (Powers keep their normal destination).
SLIPPERY_POWER.description: The next time this creature takes damage, it only takes [blue]1[/blue] damage.
SLIPPERY_POWER.smartDescription: The next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] takes damage, it only takes [blue]1[/blue] damage each time.
FROZEN_KEYWORD_POWER.title: Frozen
FROZEN_KEYWORD_POWER.description: This card cannot be played this turn; before its next play, its cost is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].
MORE_ENCHANT_SOUL_LINK_POWER.title: Soul Link
MORE_ENCHANT_SOUL_LINK_POWER.description: Whenever you lose HP, the linked target loses the same amount of HP.
MORE_ENCHANT_SOUL_LINK_TARGET_POWER.desc: This creature is linked by Soul Link.
MORE_ENCHANT_WRONG_TARGET_POWER.title: Wrong Target
MORE_ENCHANT_WRONG_TARGET_POWER.descript: Whenever you gain a debuff, transfer it to a random enemy.
FIGHT_FIRE_WITH_FIRE_HEAL_POWER.title: Fight Fire with Fire
FIGHT_FIRE_WITH_FIRE_HEAL_POWER.descript: At the start of the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns: heal [blue]3[/blue] HP.
FIGHT_FIRE_WITH_FIRE_HEAL_POWER.smartDes: At the start of the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] heals [blue]3[/blue] HP.
